productCategories.name: Fidget Gears
productCategories.description: Mechanical little distractions for busy hands and overloaded brains.
productCategories.note: For people who think better while aggressively rotating something.
productCategories.identity: Bright, tactile, and slightly overcaffeinated. This category feels energetic on purpose.

products.name: The 'Focus' Fidget Gear
products.label: Desk toy
products.description: Mechanical satisfaction for people who open twenty tabs and call it research.
products.care: Keep away from direct heat, dust with a dry cloth, and do not leave it inside a car in May.
products.story: Designed for that exact moment when your brain refuses to lock in unless your hands have a side quest.
comparison: Desk focus and repetitive thumb work
products.categoryIdentity: Bright, tactile, and slightly overcaffeinated. This category feels energetic on purpose.

products.label: Paperweight
products.description: Tiny emotional support object for documents and deadlines alike.
products.care: Keep away from enthusiastic toddlers and anyone who tests paperweights by throwing them.

fandomCollections.name: Radiant Protocol
fandomCollections.description: Clean-lined props, tactical utility, and desk totems inspired by high-stakes defusal and radiant abilities.
fandomCollections.identity: Tactical and clean. Built for setups that look like they belong in a futuristic esports cafe, without the RGB noise.

products.name: Floating City Cement Coaster
products.label: Cementware
products.description: A heavy, brutalist concrete coaster bearing tactical map geometry. Protects your desk with anchor weight.
products.care: Wipe with a damp cloth. Do not soak.
products.story: Engineered for people who need their drink coaster to look like it could withstand a tactical strike.

products.name: 3D Printed Radiant Totem
products.label: Fan collectible
products.description: Small-batch PLA+ printed pedestal for your weapon buddies. Clean layer lines, matte finish, zero wobble.
products.care: Keep away from direct heat and dust gently.
products.story: A perfect pedestal for the tiny digital companions that watch you throw rounds.

products.name: Econ Drop Creds Tray
products.label: Desk utility
products.description: Resin-infused 3D printed tray for your keys and coins, shaped like an in-game economy drop.
products.care: Do not drag across polished surfaces.
products.story: For when you need a drop in real life to hold your everyday carry.

fandomCollections.name: Global Offensive
fandomCollections.description: Utility markers, map geometry references, and objects for people who obsess over spray patterns and rushing B.
fandomCollections.identity: Brutalist, functional, and deeply specific. For players who appreciate the geometry of a good smoke lineup.

products.name: Smoke Lineup Marker Set
products.label: 3D Printed
products.description: Precision printed PLA markers for players who enjoy overthinking map geometry. Satisfyingly tactile.
products.care: Keep away from heat.
products.story: Tactile tokens for the player who spends more time in custom servers than actual matches.

products.name: Bomb Site A Concrete Block
products.label: Cementware
products.description: Brutalist concrete paperweight stamped with site markings. Literally feels like a piece of the map.
products.care: Heavy object. Do not drop on toes or glass desks.
products.story: A literal piece of concrete geometry for your desk. Defuse kit not included.

products.name: Defusal Kit Cable Route
products.label: Cable management
products.description: A flexible TPU-printed cable router to tame the mess behind your monitor without looking corporate.
products.care: Clean desk surface before sticking.
products.story: Tames the chaotic wires behind your rig with a tactical aesthetic.

fandomCollections.name: Middle Realms
fandomCollections.description: Relics, ruins, and miniature architecture for desks that deserve a little more fantasy and fellowship.
fandomCollections.identity: Heavier, earthier, and undeniably epic. Brings the weight of ancient histories right to your bookshelf.

products.name: Halfling Door Desk Relic
products.label: Resin print
products.description: High-detail resin printed architectural tribute for desks that want to feel like a quiet morning in the shires.
products.care: Dust gently with a soft brush.
products.story: A perfectly round, welcoming door that leads nowhere but reminds you of home.

products.name: River Kings Cement Bookends
products.label: Cementware
products.description: Heavy, hand-poured cement bookends that command respect on any bookshelf. Extremely dense.
products.care: Do not drag. Lift to reposition.
products.story: Twin monoliths to guard your fantasy tomes. They shall not pass.

products.name: Elvish Script Token Tray
products.label: 3D Printed
products.description: Matte PLA+ catchall tray engraved with ancient script. A safe place to drop your keys and coins.
products.care: Wipe with a dry cloth.
products.story: The script running along the edge doesn't actually glow, but the vibe is there.

fandomCollections.name: Wizarding Halls
fandomCollections.description: Magical utility objects and enchanted diorama pieces for the modern scholar of witchcraft and wizardry.
fandomCollections.identity: Mysterious, scholarly, and a bit theatrical. Perfect for turning a regular desk into a proper study.

products.name: Magical Academy Book Nook
products.label: Mixed Media
products.description: 3D printed stone-texture walls combined with warm LED lighting. Pure magical drama for your books.
products.care: Keep away from moisture. Powered by USB.
products.story: Creates an illusion of a secret cobblestone alleyway hidden right between your novels.

products.name: Wizard's Wand Pen Holder
products.label: 3D Printed
products.description: A dignified PLA+ printed rest for your stylus, pen, or actual wand. Finished to look like polished dark wood.
products.care: Wipe with a dry cloth.
products.story: Elevates your writing instrument to artifact status.

products.name: House Crest Cement Tile
products.label: Cementware
products.description: A beautifully poured concrete tile bearing a scholarly crest. Heavy, architectural, and completely serious.
products.care: Hang securely on a masonry wall or display on an easel.
products.story: A brutalist take on school pride. Heavy enough to survive a bludger.

fandomCollections.name: Earth's Mightiest
fandomCollections.description: Cinematic icons and tech-forward desk upgrades for the hero shelf and billionaire playboys.
fandomCollections.identity: Bold, graphic, and highly engineered. It should feel like something a certain tech genius left in the lab.

products.name: Billionaire's Reactor Core Shell
products.label: 3D Printed
products.description: Multi-part PLA+ enclosure for LED pucks. Designed to make your setup look mildly reactor-powered.
products.care: Fits standard 85mm LED pucks. Do not use heat-generating bulbs.
products.story: Proof that Tony had a heart, or at least a really cool desk lamp.

products.name: Hero's Shield Alloy Coaster
products.label: Cementware
products.description: Functional fandom cast in concrete. Absorbs condensation without turning into a convention booth.
products.care: Wipe down. Patina will develop over time with coffee rings.
products.story: It won't bounce back if you throw it, but it will protect your desk from water rings.

products.name: Wall-Crawler Cable Clip
products.label: 3D Printed
products.description: A flexible, strong TPU cable clip that anchors to the edge of your desk to save your charging cord.
products.care: Clean desk surface before sticking.
products.story: Hangs onto the edge of your desk like its life depends on it. Saves your cables from falling into the abyss.
